title: Objectives of Identification in Time Series Analysis
description: A flowchart illustrating the three primary objectives and their sequential purpose in the identification stage of building an ARIMA model.
relationships: The process begins by Checking for Stationarity to determine the differencing term (d). This informs the need to Determine Model Order (p, q) for the AR and MA components. Finally, the analyst must Identify Seasonal Components to complete the full model specification (P, D, Q, S).
